zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe II de MONFORT於大約1225年出生時，他的父親Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I22歲，母親Eleanor de Courtenay18歲。他於1250年與Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年9月24日在突尼西亞تونس享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe II de MONFORT于大约1225年出生时，他的父亲Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I22岁，母亲Eleanor de Courtenay18岁。他于1250年与Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年9月24日在突尼西亚تونس享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: MONFORT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .
English: variant of   Mount  .

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek. See Philip .

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe II de MONFORT was born about 1225, his father, Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, was 22 and his mother, Eleanor de Courtenay, was 18. He married Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix in 1250. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 24 September 1270, in Tunis, Tunisia, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe II de MONFORT est né environ 1225, son père, Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Courtenay, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix en 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1270, à Tunis, Tunisie, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe II de MONFORT um 1225 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I 22 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Courtenay 18. Er hat 1250 Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1270 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Tunis, Tunesien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe II de MONFORT è nato il circa 1225, il suo padre, Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Courtenay, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix nel 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1270, nel Tunis, Tunisia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe II de MONFORTが約1225年に生まれた時，父Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES Iは22歳，母Eleanor de Courtenayは18歳であった。1250年にJeanne De Lévis-Mirepoixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年9月24日にチュニジアتونسで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippe II de MONFORT(이)가 대략 1225년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Courtenay(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1250년 Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 9월 24일 튀니지 تونس에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe II de MONFORT nasceu aproximadamente 1225, seu pai, Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Courtenay, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix em 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1270, em Tunis, Tunísia, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe II de MONFORT родился около 1225 г., его отцу по имени Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Courtenay, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix в 1250 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 сентября 1270 г. в местности تونس, Тунис в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe II de MONFORT nació aproximadamente 1225, su papá, Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Courtenay, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix en 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1270, en Tunis, Túnez, a la edad de 46 años.
